radio_buttons.description: Configuration for the subscription plan radio buttons section. Defines the list of selectable subscription options, their visual style, and selection behavior on the offer screen.

indicator_alignment.description: Alignment of the radio button selection indicator. Values: 'right' to place the indicator on the right side, 'none' to hide the indicator, or any other value (or omitted) to place it on the left (default).

$stable.description: Compose compiler stability flag. Used internally by the Kotlin Compose compiler for recomposition optimization.

buttons.description: Array of radio button items representing the available subscription plan options. Each button references a subscription button component by ID and defines its selection state and visual styling.

badge.description: Badge configuration displayed on the radio button, typically used to highlight promotional information such as discounts or special offers.

$stable.description: Compose compiler stability flag. Used internally by the Kotlin Compose compiler for recomposition optimization.

color.description: Text color of the badge. Color value from the backend/API.

deselected_text_color.description: Text color of the badge when the parent radio button is in the deselected state. Color value from the backend/API.

deselected_bg_color.description: Background color of the badge when the parent radio button is in the deselected state. Color value from the backend/API.

variant.description: Visual variant/style identifier for the badge rendering.

hide_on_deselected_state.description: Whether to hide the badge when the parent radio button is in the deselected state. When true, the badge is only visible when the radio button is selected.

text.description: Text displayed on the badge. Can contain '%%packageId%%' template placeholders that are replaced with actual pricing information from the subscription package.

selected_bg_color.description: Background color of the radio button when it is in the selected state. Color value from the backend/API.

disabled_text_color.description: Text color of the radio button when it is in the deselected/disabled state. Color value from the backend/API.

$stable.description: Compose compiler stability flag. Used internally by the Kotlin Compose compiler for recomposition optimization.

selected_border_color.description: Border color of the radio button when it is in the selected state. Color value from the backend/API.

is_selected.description: Whether this radio button is selected by default when the screen first loads.

is_enlarged_button_component.description: Whether this radio button should use an enlarged button layout, providing a larger tap target and more prominent visual appearance.

id.description: Component ID used to look up the subscription button configuration from the 'subscription_button' remote settings. Links this radio button to its package, CTA styling, and pricing details.

disabled_background_color.description: Background color of the radio button when it is in the deselected/disabled state. Color value from the backend/API.

border_color.description: Border color of the radio button when it is in the deselected state. Color value from the backend/API.

gradient_type.description: Gradient type applied to the badge background on this radio button.

purchase_on_select.description: When true, enables purchase flow on double-tap of a radio button selection, allowing users to quickly proceed to purchase without pressing a separate CTA button.

type.description: The visual style type of the radio buttons. Values: 'tiers_style' for the tiers layout style, or any other value (or omitted) for the default radio button style.

trial_reminder_toggle.description: Configuration for the trial reminder toggle component. When enabled, provides a toggle for users to opt into trial-related reminders. Becomes muted when the selected radio button does not have a free trial promotion type.

is_enabled.description: Whether the trial reminder toggle component is enabled. Defaults to false if not specified, unlike most other components which default to true.

$stable.description: Compose compiler stability flag. Used internally by the Kotlin Compose compiler for recomposition optimization.

id.description: Component ID used to look up the trial reminder toggle configuration from the 'offer_promotion_toggle' remote settings.

toggle_placeholder_text.description: Configuration for the toggle placeholder text component, displayed as a text label associated with the toggle area on the subscription offer screen.

is_enabled.description: Whether the toggle placeholder text component is enabled. When false, the placeholder text is not fetched or displayed. Defaults to true if not specified.

$stable.description: Compose compiler stability flag. Used internally by the Kotlin Compose compiler for recomposition optimization.

id.description: Component ID used to look up the toggle placeholder text configuration from the 'offer_toggle_placeholder_text' remote settings.

content_id.description: Unique screen name identifier used to match this screen configuration to a specific touchpoint or variant. Falls back to 'default' if no match is found for the requested screen name.

footer.description: Configuration for a footer component. Defined in the data model but not currently wired into the Optimus screen rendering pipeline.

is_enabled.description: Whether the footer component is enabled. Defined in the data model but not currently used in screen rendering.

$stable.description: Compose compiler stability flag. Used internally by the Kotlin Compose compiler for recomposition optimization.

id.description: Component ID for the footer component. Defined in the data model but not currently used in screen rendering.

banner.description: Configuration for the banner component at the top of the subscription offer screen. Displays media content (image, video, GIF, or Lottie animation) and supports tap actions via hook URLs.

is_enabled.description: Whether the banner component is enabled. When false, the banner is not fetched or displayed. Defaults to true if not specified.

$stable.description: Compose compiler stability flag. Used internally by the Kotlin Compose compiler for recomposition optimization.

id.description: Component ID used to look up the banner configuration from the 'offer_screen_banners' remote settings.

description.description: Configuration for a description component. Defined in the data model but not currently wired into the Optimus screen rendering pipeline.

is_enabled.description: Whether the description component is enabled. Defined in the data model but not currently used in screen rendering.

$stable.description: Compose compiler stability flag. Used internally by the Kotlin Compose compiler for recomposition optimization.

id.description: Component ID for the description component. Defined in the data model but not currently used in screen rendering.

title.description: Configuration for the screen title component, rendered with Typography.T6 and SEMI_BOLD font weight. Displays the main heading text on the subscription offer screen.

is_enabled.description: Whether the title component is enabled. When false, the title is not fetched or displayed. Defaults to true if not specified.

$stable.description: Compose compiler stability flag. Used internally by the Kotlin Compose compiler for recomposition optimization.

id.description: Component ID used to look up the title configuration from the 'offer_screen_titles' remote settings.

$stable.description: Compose compiler stability flag. Used internally by the Kotlin Compose compiler for recomposition optimization.

close_button.description: Configuration for the close button component on the subscription offer screen. Controls visibility, alignment (left/right), icon, and margins of the dismiss button.

is_enabled.description: Whether the close button component is enabled. When false, the close button is not fetched from remote settings. Defaults to true if not specified.

$stable.description: Compose compiler stability flag. Used internally by the Kotlin Compose compiler for recomposition optimization.

id.description: Component ID used to look up the close button configuration from the 'subscription_screen_close_button' remote settings.

subtitle.description: Configuration for the screen subtitle component, rendered with Typography.T5 and MEDIUM font weight. Displays secondary descriptive text below the title on the subscription offer screen.

is_enabled.description: Whether the subtitle component is enabled. When false, the subtitle is not fetched or displayed. Defaults to true if not specified.

$stable.description: Compose compiler stability flag. Used internally by the Kotlin Compose compiler for recomposition optimization.

id.description: Component ID used to look up the subtitle configuration from the 'offer_screen_subtitles' remote settings.

banner_placeholder.description: Configuration for the banner placeholder component, which displays promotional text and optionally a badge image above the banner area, with an optional shadow effect.

is_enabled.description: Whether the banner placeholder component is enabled. When false, the banner placeholder is not displayed. Defaults to true if not specified.

$stable.description: Compose compiler stability flag. Used internally by the Kotlin Compose compiler for recomposition optimization.

id.description: Component ID used to look up the banner placeholder configuration from the 'offer_banner_placeholder_text' remote settings.

secondary_button.description: Configuration for the secondary button component, displayed as underlined text. On tap, it either opens a hook URL action or shows a subscription tiers half-screen fragment.

is_enabled.description: Whether the secondary button component is enabled. When false, the secondary button is not fetched or displayed. Defaults to true if not specified.

$stable.description: Compose compiler stability flag. Used internally by the Kotlin Compose compiler for recomposition optimization.

id.description: Component ID used to look up the secondary button configuration from the 'offer_screen_secondary_button' remote settings.

logo.description: Configuration for a logo component. Defined in the data model but not currently wired into the Optimus screen rendering pipeline.

is_enabled.description: Whether the logo component is enabled. Defined in the data model but not currently used in screen rendering.

$stable.description: Compose compiler stability flag. Used internally by the Kotlin Compose compiler for recomposition optimization.

id.description: Component ID for the logo component. Defined in the data model but not currently used in screen rendering.

switch_package_toggle.description: Configuration for the package switch toggle component. When enabled, allows users to switch between subscription packages (e.g., toggling a free trial option), updating the CTA button and pricing accordingly.

is_enabled.description: Whether the switch package toggle component is enabled. When false, the toggle is not fetched or displayed. Defaults to true if not specified.

$stable.description: Compose compiler stability flag. Used internally by the Kotlin Compose compiler for recomposition optimization.

id.description: Component ID used to look up the toggle configuration from the 'offer_promotion_toggle' remote settings.
